productInfo.name: EOS R1
productInfo.tagline: When speed is everything, the EOS R1 ensures you'll finish in first place.
productInfo.description: Sports photography can be almost as competitive as the action on the pitch. That's why we developed the EOS R1– a camera that lets you shoot faster, capture defining moments, and get images and video back to your client first – winning the top spot on the page.

specs.af: Dual Pixel Intelligent AF with Cross-type AF

sections.title: Ahead of the Game
sections.description: Sports photography can be almost as competitive as the action on the pitch. That's why we developed the EOS R1– a camera that lets you shoot faster, capture defining moments, and get images and video back to your client first.

sections.title: The Ultimate Assistant
sections.description: At your side, helping you shoot the best work of your creative career.

sections.title: Creativity Through Technology
sections.description: Since 1989, Canon EOS-1 series cameras have led the way for professional sports, news and action photographers. As the result of 35 years of evolution the EOS R1 looks to the future as our flagship EOS camera.

sections.title: Dual Pixel Intelligent AF
sections.description: With Action Priority mode that automatically determines the subject in football, volleyball and basketball.

sections.title: Cross-type AF
sections.description: Our Dual Pixel Intelligent AF is sensitive to horizontal and vertical lines for greater precision.

sections.title: 24.2 megapixel Stacked Sensor
sections.description: A back-illuminated CMOS sensor that delivers superb performance in low-light and ultrafast read-out speeds, virtually eliminating rolling-shutter distortion.

sections.title: Capture Stills and Video Concurrently
sections.description: Press the shutter release while shooting Full HD video to capture a burst of jpeg images at the same time.

sections.title: In-camera Upscaling
sections.description: Canon's deep-learning technology allows images from the high sensitivity sensor to be enlarged faithfully and accurately by up to four times, up to 96 megapixels.

sections.title: 40fps Shooting with AF and AE
sections.description: With Pre-continuous shooting to capture moments that happened before you pressed the button – even when shooting RAW.

sections.title: Fast and Accurate Focus
sections.description: Focus in conditions as dark as -7.5 EV – roughly the brightness of the aurora borealis – locking on with precision and accuracy.

sections.title: Superb Video for Hybrid Creatives
sections.description: Capture 6K RAW video up to 60p, 4K up to 120p and 2K up to 240p, all from the full width of the full-frame sensor.

sections.title: Cutting-edge Connectivity
sections.description: Our best-connected camera yet? Many options including Wi-Fi 6E and 2.5G BASE-T ethernet ensure your images reach your client first.

sections.title: Autofocus Powered by Deep Learning
sections.description: The EOS R1 harnesses the power of deep-learning to identify subjects, while its DIGIC Accelerator processor tracks and captures them more accurately than ever. Action Priority mode can even identify the subject based on the action.

sections.title: Jaw-dropping Image Quality
sections.description: A new 24-megapixel sensor delivers incredible results. A lightning-fast, stacked CMOS design is sensitive in low light. A low-pass filter with 16 point separation reduces moiré and false colour.

sections.title: Extraordinary Performance
sections.description: Freeze fleeting moments in time like never before: 40 frames per second continuous shooting pairs with a lightning-fast 1/64,000 sec electronic shutter and minimal rolling shutter distortion.

sections.title: Pre-continuous Shooting
sections.description: Half press the shutter release button to begin continuously buffering up to 20 frames. At the moment you take the shot, these 'pre-captured' frames are stored too.

sections.title: Image Upscaling
sections.description: Find exquisite detail in the closest of crops. Enlarge images by up to four times in-camera, producing gallery-ready photos at up to 96-megapixels.

sections.title: Forging Multiple Strong Connections
sections.description: Be the first to get your images and video back to the client. The EOS R1 boasts more ways to get connected and the speed you need.

sections.title: 802.11ax and MIMO
sections.description: EOS R1 offers extremely stable wireless connections, thanks to Wi-Fi 6E (region dependent) and built in MIMO antennas.

sections.title: One Camera, Lots of Options
sections.description: The professional video features of the EOS R1 make this a superb option for hybrid shooters and filmmakers. Tackle interviews, run-and-gun documentaries and short films.

sections.title: Part of the EOS R Family
sections.description: Invest in a EOS R1 and you're getting more than a digital camera. You're buying an ever-growing, state-of-the-art imaging system.
